subcodes.first_line: At every moment the Herald of Truth, glorified be His majesty, calleth unto His servants that which shall exalt them, raise them up, and profit them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در هر حین منادی حق جل جلاله عباد را ندا مینماید و بما یعزهم و یرفعهم و ینفعهم
